name: Slint
description: Declarative GUI toolkit for Rust, C++, JavaScript, and Python targeting embedded, desktop, and web.

seo.title: Slint — No-code / Low-code App Builders
seo.meta_description: Slint: Declarative GUI toolkit for Rust, C++, JavaScript, and Python targeting embedded, desktop, and web.

when_to_use: Rust desktop GUI app with declarative Slint UI language
Embedded touchscreen UI for a microcontroller device
Cross-language UI shared between Rust and C++ backend
Lightweight GUI for a developer tool targeting WASM web
Native app UI for Python backend without Qt or GTK

pros: Declarative GUI that compiles to native
Rust, C++, JS, and Python bindings
Live preview speeds up UI iteration
cons: Commercial license needed for closed source
Smaller community than Qt or Flutter
review.verdict: Promising modern alternative to Qt for embedded and desktop, though Qt still wins on ecosystem maturity.
review.best_for: Embedded and desktop teams wanting a modern Rust-first declarative GUI toolkit
review.not_for: Projects needing mature widgets and battle-tested mobile cross-platform support
